Entity_Name.description: The entity the personnel has the relationship with, as free text. Required when Entity_Organization_ID is null; optional when an Organization FK is set (the Organization.Organization_Name is the canonical source)

Entity_Organization_ID.description: Set when the entity is tracked as an Organization in the model; null when it is an outside party not otherwise tracked

OtherSupport_ID.description: Set when this COI disclosure describes the same engagement also recorded as Other Support

Financial_Interest_Amount.description: Dollar value of the disclosed financial interest, when quantifiable

Disclosure_Period_Start_Date.description: The period the disclosure covers (annual disclosures span the prior year)

Disclosure_Period_End_Date.description: End of the period the disclosure covers

Review_Outcome.description: Constrained: Under_Review / No_Conflict / Manageable_Conflict / Unmanageable_Conflict / Management_Plan_Required / Cleared

Management_Plan_Description.conditional_required: Required when Review_Outcome is Manageable_Conflict or Management_Plan_Required
Management_Plan_Description.description: Required when Review_Outcome is Manageable_Conflict or Management_Plan_Required

OtherSupport.description: A Personnel record's external research support (current, pending, in-kind). The fact of outside support, person-anchored.

Personnel_ID.description: The person whose other support this is

External_Sponsor_Name.description: The funding source for the disclosed support, as free text. Required when External_Sponsor_Organization_ID is null; optional when an Organization FK is set (the Organization.Organization_Name is the canonical source)

External_Sponsor_Organization_ID.description: Set when the external sponsor is tracked as an Organization in the model

External_Project_Title.description: The title of the externally-funded project as known at the external sponsor

Annual_Effort_Months_Calendar.description: Months per year of committed effort on calendar basis

Total_Award_Amount.description: The total funded amount of the disclosed support

Effective_Start_Date.description: When the external support began or is expected to begin

Effective_End_Date.description: Null when the support is open-ended

OtherSupportDisclosure.description: A single disclosure event of an OtherSupport row. The same outside appointment is typically disclosed many times across a researcher's career.

OtherSupport_ID.description: The OtherSupport item this disclosure event reported

Disclosure_Date.description: When this specific disclosure event occurred

Disclosure_Type.description: Constrained: Initial / Annual / JIT / Progress_Report / Research_Security_Reaffirmation / Other

Triggering_Proposal_ID.description: The proposal whose submission triggered this disclosure event (null when the disclosure is not proposal-triggered)

Triggering_Award_ID.description: The award whose reporting cycle triggered this disclosure event (null when the disclosure is not award-triggered)

Disclosed_To_Sponsor_Organization_ID.description: The sponsor that received this disclosure

Notes.description: Free-text notes about the disclosure event

AllowedValues.description: Institution-specific controlled vocabularies. The Value_Group column names a family.

Value_Group.description: The lookup family name. Canonical groups: ContactType, OrganizationCapability, AwardRole, OrganizationRole, ProtocolRole, FundType, TransactionType, ModificationEventType, ActionType, DocumentType, FinanceCodePurpose, COIRelationshipType, IndirectRateType, CostShareCommitmentType, RestrictionType, DeadlineType, ProposalType, FundingMechanism, ComplianceReviewPathway, ComplianceClassificationLevel

Value_Code.description: Unique within Value_Group. Stable code used in queries

Value_Description.description: Longer description of what the value means at this institution

Canonical_Value_Code.description: The canonical code (across institutions) that this local code maps to. Null when the local code has no canonical equivalent.

BudgetCategory.description: Standardized budget line item categories (SF-424 R&R standard).

Category_Code.description: Unique. Examples: SR_PERSONNEL, OTH_PERSONNEL, EQUIPMENT, TRAVEL, PARTICIPANT_SUPPORT, OTHER_DIRECT

Category_Name.description: Human-readable name of the budget category

Is_Direct_Cost.description: True for direct-cost categories; false for indirect-cost categories

Related_Entity_Type.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / ProposalApproval / PreAwardAuthorization / Personnel / PersonnelCredential / ComplianceRequirement / SubmissionPackage / Modification / Action / Restriction / Budget / Negotiation / Terms / Report / Closeout / Equipment

Related_Entity_ID.description: PK value in the table named by Related_Entity_Type

Document_Type_Value_ID.description: Value_Group = 'DocumentType'. Recommended values: NOA / Biosketch / DMP / Budget_Justification / Other_Support / Public_Access_Plan / LOI / Sponsor_Agreement / Subaward_Agreement / Modification_Notice / Approved_Items_Schedule / Closeout_Document / Compliance_Approval_Letter / Restriction_Authority_Document / Training_Certificate

File_Name.description: Original file name of the document

File_Path.description: Path or URI to the file in object storage / content management

Parent_Document_ID.description: Self-referencing. When a new version of the same logical document is uploaded, the new row chains via this column to the predecessor. The latest version is the row at the end of the active chain.

Uploaded_By_Personnel_ID.description: The person who uploaded the document

Communication.description: Inbound or outbound correspondence between the institution and an external party.

Related_Entity_Type.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / RFA / Modification / Negotiation / Terms / ComplianceRequirement / Personnel / Closeout / Report

Related_Entity_ID.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this communication attaches to

Communication_Type.description: Constrained: Email / Phone_Call / Meeting / Letter / Portal_Message / Other

Communication_Date.description: The moment the communication occurred (or the email's sent-at timestamp)

Subject.description: The subject line for emails, the topic for meetings

Body_Text.description: Full text of the correspondence; null when body lives only in an attached Document

External_Personnel_ID.description: External participant when tracked in Personnel. Prefer this over External_Party_Name.

External_Party_Name.description: Free-text name when no Personnel record exists (one-off contacts, sponsor mailboxes)

Restriction.description: Operational constraints attached to an entity (CUI, CMMC, export control, publication holds, foreign-personnel limits).

Related_Entity_Type.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / Personnel / Equipment

Related_Entity_ID.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this restriction attaches to

Restriction_Type_Value_ID.description: Value_Group = 'RestrictionType'. Recommended values: CUI / CMMC_Level_1 / CMMC_Level_2 / CMMC_Level_3 / EAR / ITAR / Publication_Hold / Foreign_Personnel_Limit / Site_Restriction

Restriction_Level.description: Free-form qualifier (e.g., a specific ITAR category)

Effective_End_Date.description: Null for restrictions in effect indefinitely

Authority_Document_Reference.description: The regulation or contract clause this restriction comes from

Certified_By_Personnel_ID.description: References Personnel (the OSP or compliance officer who certified the restriction)

Restriction.active_query_rule: A restriction is currently active when Restriction_Status = 'Active' and Effective_Start_Date is on or before the query date and (Effective_End_Date is null or on or after the query date).

Deadline.description: Future-dated obligations attached to an entity. Calendar-style: tells you WHEN.

Related_Entity_Type.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / ProposalApproval / ComplianceRequirement / Modification / RFA / Closeout / Report

Related_Entity_ID.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this deadline attaches to

Reminder_Lead_Days.description: Number of days before Due_Date that a reminder fires

Responsible_Personnel_ID.description: The person responsible for meeting the deadline

Classification.description: Subject tags and research-area codes attached to entities.

Related_Entity_ID.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this classification attaches to

Value_Code.description: Code or term within the scheme (e.g., NSF science code 40101)

Sort_Order.description: When the entity carries multiple classifications, the order to display them

Action.description: Work items attached to entities: deliverables, checklist items, service requests, modification approvals, compliance renewals, training requirements. Worklist-style: tells you WHAT and WHO.

Related_Entity_Type.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / ProposalApproval / PreAwardAuthorization / Personnel / ComplianceRequirement / Modification / Negotiation / Terms / Closeout / Report / Equipment

Related_Entity_ID.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this action attaches to

Action_Type_Value_ID.description: Value_Group = 'ActionType'. Recommended values: Deliverable / Checklist_Item / Service_Request / Modification_Approval / Compliance_Renewal / Training_Required / Training_Completion / Subrecipient_Risk_Review / Cost_Transfer_Approval / JIT_Request / Other

Title.description: Short title of the work item

Description.description: Free-text description of the work item

Assignee_Personnel_ID.description: The person the action is assigned to

Requestor_Personnel_ID.description: The person who requested the action

Outcome_Description.description: Free-text outcome when the Action records a structured workflow with a result (subrecipient risk review, modification approval rationale, training completion notes)

Linked_Document_ID.description: References Document (e.g., the deliverable file, training certificate when Completed, the formal subrecipient risk review report)

ActivityLog.description: Typed audit events on entities. Curated business events the institution chooses to surface, not a CDC log of every column update.

Related_Entity_Type.description: Constrained to any UDM table name except ActivityLog itself. Not enumerated inline to avoid drift when the canonical table set evolves.

Related_Entity_ID.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this event is about

Activity_Type.description: Agency / sponsor correspondence lives in Communication, not here.

Description.description: Free-text description; for field changes, includes the field name

ActivityLog.self_reference_note: ActivityLog does not log to itself; ActivityLog rows do not appear in Related_Entity_Type.

optional_extensions.name: Detailed Export Control workflow
optional_extensions.description: ComplianceRequirement.Requirement_Type = 'Export_Control' captures the determination. Not modeled: Technology Control Plans (TCP doc lives as a Document attachment), per-shipment determinations, ECCN / commodity classification details, BIS or DDTC license records, foreign-national screening events, visit-by-visit foreign national clearances.

optional_extensions.name: Foreign-engagement and research-security disclosures (NSPM-33)
optional_extensions.description: Foreign affiliations, foreign appointments, foreign talent-program participation, foreign funding sources, country codes on COI entities, Award-level foreign-component flags, and senior/key personnel research-security disclosure state machines are not modeled. The canonical ConflictOfInterest table covers traditional domestic conflicts. Institutions subject to NSPM-33 add a local extension.

optional_extensions.name: Publications and research outputs
optional_extensions.description: Publications, presentations, datasets, software releases. Output portfolio left to specialized publication systems (Symplectic, ORCID-integrated CRIS, institutional repositories).

optional_extensions.name: Invention disclosures and tech transfer
optional_extensions.description: Invention disclosures, patent filing, prosecution, licensing, royalty distribution, spinout/equity tracking. Live in specialized tech transfer systems (Wellspring, Inteum, Sophia). UDM touchpoints: Bayh-Dole reporting via Report.Report_Type = 'Invention_Statement'.

optional_extensions.name: HR / payroll data
optional_extensions.description: Academic rank, IBS, appointment calendar type, joint appointments, benefits, etc. Live in HRIS (Workday, Banner HR, PeopleSoft HR).

optional_extensions.name: Detailed accounting / general ledger
optional_extensions.description: Full GL detail beyond Fund/Account/FinanceCode/Transaction lives in the institutional ERP.

optional_extensions.name: Cost transfer workflow
optional_extensions.description: Financial movement is Transaction with Transaction_Type = 'Cost_Transfer_In/Out'. Institutional approval workflow captured as Action with Action_Type = 'Cost_Transfer_Approval'. No dedicated CostTransfer entity.

optional_extensions.name: Data management plan compliance
optional_extensions.description: DMP document as Document attachment. Ongoing compliance tracked as Action. No first-class DataManagementPlan entity.

optional_extensions.name: IT inventory / application catalog
optional_extensions.description: Catalog of operational systems lives in IT inventory or service-management. No ApplicationSystem entity.

optional_extensions.name: Service tickets and request tracking
optional_extensions.description: Service requests and tickets from institutional ticketing systems (TeamDynamix, ServiceNow, Jira, Zendesk) related to research administration. The canonical model does not include a ServiceRequest entity. Recommended pattern: capture each ticket as an Action row with Action_Type resolving to 'Service_Request', attached polymorphically to the relevant Proposal / Award / Subaward / ComplianceRequirement via Related_Entity_Type + Related_Entity_ID. Action carries Title, Description, Assignee_Personnel_ID, Requestor_Personnel_ID, Due_Date, Action_Status, Priority, Origin, and Outcome_Description; the upstream ticketing system is named in the title or in the Source_System audit column; the ticket's external ID lives in Source_Record_ID. Per-ticket operational state (queue, escalation level, SLA timers, internal comments) stays in the ticketing system. Institutions with substantial ticket volume that need fields beyond Action's columns add a local TicketDetail extension keyed by Action_ID with platform-specific fields. No separate ApplicationSystem catalog is needed.

implementation.local_extension_when_needed: TicketDetail keyed by Action_ID; only when platform-specific fields beyond Action are required

optional_extensions.name: Audit and findings tracking
optional_extensions.description: Sponsor audits, single audits, DCAA, internal, IG audits. Institutions add a local Audit extension.

optional_extensions.name: Field-level audit / history tables
optional_extensions.description: UDM is designed for versioned storage (Dolt, Iceberg, temporal tables). Institutions on storage without versioning add their own field-level audit tables.

optional_extensions.name: Clinical trial management
optional_extensions.description: ClinicalTrials.gov / ISRCTN registration, NCT numbers, IND/IDE numbers, DSMB, enrollment, CRF, adverse events. Lives in dedicated CTMS systems.

optional_extensions.name: Human subjects participant payments
optional_extensions.description: Per-participant compensation records live in study-team systems (REDCap, OnCore). UDM sees only the bulk drawdown as a Transaction.

optional_extensions.name: Multi-currency awards and subawards
optional_extensions.description: All Money columns carry a single institutional currency convention. Institutions with multi-currency activity add a local extension for per-row currency, exchange rate at posting, and reporting-currency conversion.

example_views.description: Worked SQL views demonstrating common operational and analytic queries against the schema. These are reference patterns; institutions may rename, adapt, or replace them. Written in MySQL/MariaDB dialect to match the type system used elsewhere in this file. The 'today' / CURRENT_DATE filter expressions assume the deployment treats a row as active-on-date when Start_Date <= today AND (End_Date IS NULL OR End_Date >= today).

views.name: vw_Active_Awards
views.purpose: Currently-active Awards with derived current-state columns and the operating Sponsor.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Active_Awards AS
SELECT
  a.Award_ID,
  a.Award_Number,
  a.FAIN,
  a.Award_Title,
  a.Award_Status,
  a.Sponsor_Organization_ID,
  a.Administering_Organization_ID,
  a.Mechanism_Value_ID,
  a.Group_ID,
  a.Original_Start_Date,
  a.Original_End_Date,
  a.Current_End_Date,
  a.Original_Total_Funded,
  a.Current_Total_Funded,
  a.Current_PI_Personnel_ID
FROM Award a
WHERE a.Award_Status = 'Active'
  AND a.Is_Active = true;

views.name: vw_Award_Lineage
views.purpose: Computes the lineage root for every active Award via COALESCE(Originating_Award_ID, Award_ID). Consumers query 'all Awards in a research line' by selecting where Lineage_Root_Award_ID equals the same expression for the target Award.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Award_Lineage AS
SELECT
  a.Award_ID,
  a.Award_Number,
  COALESCE(a.Originating_Award_ID, a.Award_ID) AS Lineage_Root_Award_ID,
  a.Group_ID,
  a.Award_Status,
  a.Parent_Award_ID
FROM Award a
WHERE a.Is_Active = true;
views.usage_example: SELECT * FROM vw_Award_Lineage WHERE Lineage_Root_Award_ID = (SELECT COALESCE(Originating_Award_ID, Award_ID) FROM Award WHERE Award_ID = :target_award_id);

views.name: vw_Subaward_With_Prime
views.purpose: Subaward joined with its Prime Award (when one exists). Pre-award Subawards (Subaward_Status = 'Proposed') return NULL on the Prime side.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Subaward_With_Prime AS
SELECT
  s.Subaward_ID,
  s.Subaward_Number,
  s.Subaward_Status,
  s.Subrecipient_Organization_ID,
  s.Total_Subaward_Amount,
  s.Original_Start_Date AS Sub_Start_Date,
  s.Current_End_Date AS Sub_Current_End_Date,
  s.Current_PI_Personnel_ID AS Sub_Current_PI_Personnel_ID,
  p.Award_ID AS Prime_Award_ID,
  p.Award_Number AS Prime_Award_Number,
  p.FAIN AS Prime_FAIN,
  p.Award_Status AS Prime_Award_Status,
  p.Sponsor_Organization_ID AS Prime_Sponsor_Organization_ID
FROM Subaward s
LEFT JOIN Award p ON s.Prime_Award_ID = p.Award_ID
WHERE s.Is_Active = true;

views.name: vw_Active_IRB_Coverage
views.purpose: Awards (and Subawards) currently covered by an active IRB ComplianceRequirement. Use the same pattern with WHERE Requirement_Type IN (...) for other regimes.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Active_IRB_Coverage AS
SELECT
  cv.ComplianceCoverage_ID,
  cv.Award_ID,
  cv.Subaward_ID,
  cr.ComplianceRequirement_ID,
  cr.Compliance_Number,
  cr.Approved_Date,
  cr.Expiration_Date,
  cv.Coverage_Start_Date
FROM ComplianceCoverage cv
JOIN ComplianceRequirement cr ON cv.ComplianceRequirement_ID = cr.ComplianceRequirement_ID
WHERE cr.Requirement_Type = 'IRB'
  AND cr.Requirement_Status = 'Approved'
  AND (cr.Expiration_Date IS NULL OR cr.Expiration_Date >= CURRENT_DATE)
  AND cv.Coverage_End_Date IS NULL
  AND cv.Is_Active = true
  AND cr.Is_Active = true;

views.name: vw_Overdue_Reports
views.purpose: Reports whose Due_Date is in the past and whose Report_Status indicates they have not been accepted or waived.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Overdue_Reports AS
SELECT
  r.Report_ID,
  r.Award_ID,
  r.Subaward_ID,
  r.Report_Type,
  r.Reporting_Period_Start_Date,
  r.Reporting_Period_End_Date,
  r.Due_Date,
  r.Report_Status,
  DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, r.Due_Date) AS Days_Overdue
FROM Report r
WHERE r.Due_Date < CURRENT_DATE
  AND r.Report_Status IN ('Pending', 'Drafted', 'Returned_for_Revision', 'Late')
  AND r.Is_Active = true;

views.name: vw_Award_PI_Timeline
views.purpose: Full PI history per Award via AwardRole; one row per (Award, Personnel, role-stint). Use the active-on-date predicate at query time to filter to a specific point in time.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Award_PI_Timeline AS
SELECT
  ar.AwardRole_ID,
  ar.Award_ID,
  ar.Subaward_ID,
  ar.Personnel_ID,
  ar.Start_Date,
  ar.End_Date,
  av.Value_Code AS Role_Code,
  av.Canonical_Value_Code AS Canonical_Role_Code,
  ar.Is_Contact_PI
FROM AwardRole ar
JOIN AllowedValues av ON ar.Role_Value_ID = av.AllowedValue_ID
WHERE av.Canonical_Value_Code IN ('PI', 'Multi_PI')
  AND ar.Is_Active = true;
views.usage_example: SELECT Personnel_ID FROM vw_Award_PI_Timeline WHERE Award_ID = :x AND Start_Date <= :date_d AND (End_Date IS NULL OR End_Date >= :date_d);

views.name: vw_Award_Budget_Summary
views.purpose: Original vs Current funding and end-date for each Award, showing the net effect of approved Modifications.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Award_Budget_Summary AS
SELECT
  a.Award_ID,
  a.Award_Number,
  a.Original_Total_Funded,
  a.Current_Total_Funded,
  (a.Current_Total_Funded - a.Original_Total_Funded) AS Net_Modification_Amount,
  a.Original_End_Date,
  a.Current_End_Date,
  DATEDIFF(a.Current_End_Date, a.Original_End_Date) AS Days_Extended
FROM Award a
WHERE a.Is_Active = true;

views.name: vw_Effort_Certification_Status
views.purpose: Per (Award/Subaward, period) summary of effort rows by Lifecycle_Stage. Highlights periods where Charged effort has not been Certified.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Effort_Certification_Status AS
SELECT
  ar.Award_ID,
  ar.Subaward_ID,
  e.Period_Start_Date,
  e.Period_End_Date,
  COUNT(*) AS Total_Effort_Rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.Lifecycle_Stage = 'Charged' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Charged_Count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.Lifecycle_Stage = 'Certified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Certified_Count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.Lifecycle_Stage = 'Charged'
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM Effort e2
            WHERE e2.Parent_Effort_ID = e.Effort_ID
              AND e2.Lifecycle_Stage = 'Certified'
              AND e2.Is_Active = true)
          THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Uncertified_Charged_Count
FROM Effort e
JOIN AwardRole ar ON e.AwardRole_ID = ar.AwardRole_ID
WHERE e.Is_Active = true
GROUP BY ar.Award_ID, ar.Subaward_ID, e.Period_Start_Date, e.Period_End_Date;

views.name: vw_Approved_Modifications
views.purpose: Approved Modifications with the Event_Type resolved to its canonical code and the financial / date impact surfaced. Excludes Reversed Modifications.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Approved_Modifications AS
SELECT
  m.Modification_ID,
  m.Award_ID,
  m.Subaward_ID,
  m.Modification_Number,
  m.Effective_Date,
  av.Value_Code AS Event_Type_Code,
  av.Canonical_Value_Code AS Canonical_Event_Type,
  m.Funding_Change_Amount,
  m.New_End_Date,
  m.Approval_Status,
  m.Description
FROM Modification m
JOIN AllowedValues av ON m.Event_Type_Value_ID = av.AllowedValue_ID
WHERE m.Approval_Status = 'Approved'
  AND m.Is_Active = true;

views.name: vw_Active_Restrictions
views.purpose: Currently-in-force Restriction rows across all attachable entity types, with the Restriction_Type resolved.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Active_Restrictions AS
SELECT
  r.Restriction_ID,
  r.Related_Entity_Type,
  r.Related_Entity_ID,
  rt.Value_Code AS Restriction_Type_Code,
  rt.Canonical_Value_Code AS Canonical_Restriction_Type,
  r.Restriction_Level,
  r.Effective_Start_Date,
  r.Effective_End_Date,
  r.Restriction_Status
FROM Restriction r
JOIN AllowedValues rt ON r.Restriction_Type_Value_ID = rt.AllowedValue_ID
WHERE r.Restriction_Status = 'Active'
  AND r.Effective_Start_Date <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND (r.Effective_End_Date IS NULL OR r.Effective_End_Date >= CURRENT_DATE)
  AND r.Is_Active = true;

views.name: vw_All_ContactDetails
views.purpose: Unified contact details from both Personnel and Organization owners, with the owner type and name surfaced so consumers can query 'all email addresses on file' or 'all contacts for organization X' without unioning the two XOR cases manually.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_All_ContactDetails AS
SELECT
  cd.ContactDetails_ID,
  CASE WHEN cd.Personnel_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Personnel' ELSE 'Organization' END AS Owner_Type,
  COALESCE(cd.Personnel_ID, cd.Organization_ID) AS Owner_ID,
  CASE WHEN cd.Personnel_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(p.First_Name, ' ', p.Last_Name) ELSE o.Organization_Name END AS Owner_Name,
  ct.Value_Code AS Contact_Type_Code,
  cd.Contact_Value,
  cd.Is_Primary
FROM ContactDetails cd
LEFT JOIN Personnel p ON cd.Personnel_ID = p.Personnel_ID
LEFT JOIN Organization o ON cd.Organization_ID = o.Organization_ID
JOIN AllowedValues ct ON cd.Contact_Type_Value_ID = ct.AllowedValue_ID
WHERE cd.Is_Active = true;

views.name: vw_Active_Personnel_Roles
views.purpose: Currently-active AwardRole rows on currently-active Awards or Subawards. Captures the operational 'who is on the team right now' query without per-consumer date filtering.
views.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_Active_Personnel_Roles AS
SELECT
  ar.AwardRole_ID,
  ar.Personnel_ID,
  CONCAT(p.First_Name, ' ', p.Last_Name) AS Personnel_Name,
  ar.Award_ID,
  ar.Subaward_ID,
  COALESCE(a.Award_Number, s.Subaward_Number) AS Agreement_Number,
  rv.Value_Code AS Role_Code,
  rv.Canonical_Value_Code AS Canonical_Role,
  ar.FTE_Percent,
  ar.Credit_Percent,
  ar.Is_Key_Personnel,
  ar.Is_Contact_PI,
  ar.Start_Date,
  ar.End_Date
FROM AwardRole ar
JOIN Personnel p ON ar.Personnel_ID = p.Personnel_ID
LEFT JOIN Award a ON ar.Award_ID = a.Award_ID
LEFT JOIN Subaward s ON ar.Subaward_ID = s.Subaward_ID
JOIN AllowedValues rv ON ar.Role_Value_ID = rv.AllowedValue_ID
WHERE ar.Is_Active = true
  AND ar.Start_Date <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND (ar.End_Date IS NULL OR ar.End_Date >= CURRENT_DATE)
  AND (
    (ar.Award_ID IS NOT NULL AND a.Award_Status = 'Active' AND a.Is_Active = true)
    OR (ar.Subaward_ID IS NOT NULL AND s.Subaward_Status = 'Active' AND s.Is_Active = true)
  );

summary: Six domains: Actors, Funding Cycle, Effort, Money, Compliance, Attachments. AllowedValues and BudgetCategory are implementation tables that support the model rather than a domain.

Eight universal patterns: identifier convention, hierarchy, role-named foreign keys, polymorphic attachment, two-FK exclusive-or attachment, Lifecycle_Stage discriminator, AllowedValues extensibility, boolean naming.
Audit and provenance columns (Created_At, Updated_At, Created_By_Personnel_ID, Updated_By_Personnel_ID, Source_System, Source_Record_ID, Is_Active) are universal across every table.
Hub entities: Personnel, Organization, Proposal, Award, AllowedValues.
Lifecycle_Stage tables: Budget, Effort, CostShare, Payment.
Polymorphic Attachment tables: Document, Communication, Restriction, Deadline, Classification, Action, ActivityLog.
Subaward spans pre-award and post-award on a single row identity.
Three parallel 'person-in-role' tables: AwardRole, OrganizationRole, ProtocolRole.
Compliance covers regulatory requirements across regimes via ComplianceRequirement + ComplianceCoverage (M:N) + ProtocolRole (staff roster).

Award is the fundamental unit of sponsored work. Every Award originates from a Proposal. Original_End_Date and Original_Total_Funded are frozen at execution; Current_End_Date, Current_Total_Funded, and Current_PI_Personnel_ID are derived.

Grouping of related Awards under one longitudinal identity is supported by Proposal.Originating_Proposal_ID (derived lineage root), Proposal.Group_ID (user-maintained), and Award.Group_ID (pre-filled from originating Proposal).
Foreign-engagement disclosures and the full tech-transfer pipeline are out of scope; institutions add local extensions.

implementation_tables.description: Tables that support the model's mechanics rather than a research administration domain: institution-specific controlled vocabularies and shared reference codes. 'Domains' in the UDM refer to research-administration organizational concepts; these tables are implementation infrastructure and are intentionally not counted as a domain.
